title: Contact Helen - Helen Maguire MP
text_excerpt: Contact Helen - Helen Maguire MP Skip to main content Helen Maguire MP About Helen Contact Helen Helen's Campaigns Helen's Petitions News Newsletter & Sign Up Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join About Helen Primary Care & Cancer Spokesperson Helen on PIP Helen on Local Crime Contact Helen Privacy & Data Policy Social Media Policy Safe Contacts Policy Helen's Campaigns Helen on Epsom & St Helier Helen on Train Frequency Helen on Thames Water Helen on Cost of Living Helen on SEND Helen on Pavement Parking Helen's Petitions Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier Increase Our Train Frequency Stop Sewage Dumping End Pavement Parking Get in touch Before contacting me, please have a quick read of the tips below. If possible, please use email to contact me . If not, you can also use the phone number or address given below. Always include your full name, address and postcode when emailing, leaving a message or writing to me. I can only take on casework on behalf of people who live within the Epsom & Ewell constituency. Check who your MP is here . Please note urgent cases will be prioritised. I hold regular face-to-face advice surgeries, however I am unable to offer unscheduled face-to-face support for security reasons. Contact 💻 : helen.maguire.mp@parliament.uk ☎️: 01372 232145 ✉️: Helen Maguire MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
